text: Am the life of the party
descriptionLevel1: You’d rather stay home with a book than be the center of attention. (Party? What party?)
descriptionLevel2: You show up but mostly observe from the corner with snacks.
descriptionLevel3: Sometimes you chat, sometimes you hide. Depends on the vibe and caffeine level.
descriptionLevel4: You enjoy talking to people and usually have a good time at gatherings.
descriptionLevel5: You walk in and the energy level immediately goes up. You ARE the party.

descriptionLevel1: You cry during dog food commercials and offer help to strangers.
descriptionLevel2: You generally care about people’s feelings.
descriptionLevel3: You care… when it’s convenient and not too emotionally draining.
descriptionLevel4: You mostly focus on your own stuff and don’t get too involved.
descriptionLevel5: “Not my circus, not my monkeys” is your life motto.

descriptionLevel1: You once showed up to a camping trip with only flip-flops and hope.
descriptionLevel2: You usually wing it and somehow survive.
descriptionLevel3: You prepare when it matters, otherwise… meh.
descriptionLevel4: You like having a plan and backup plans.
descriptionLevel5: Your backpack has a backpack. You’re prepared for the apocalypse.

descriptionLevel1: A flat tire is just an opportunity to practice patience.
descriptionLevel2: You stay pretty calm even when things go wrong.
descriptionLevel3: Stress happens, but you manage most of the time.
descriptionLevel4: Small things can ruin your day pretty quickly.
descriptionLevel5: Your brain treats “maybe” as a five-alarm fire.

descriptionLevel1: You call everything “thingy” or “whatchamacallit.”
descriptionLevel2: You know enough words but don’t flex them.
descriptionLevel3: Average vocabulary, gets the job done.
descriptionLevel4: You enjoy using precise and interesting words.
descriptionLevel5: You dropped “sesquipedalian” in casual conversation… unironically.

descriptionLevel1: You talk so much your friends need a mute button.
descriptionLevel2: You’re quite chatty in most situations.
descriptionLevel3: You talk when you have something to say.
descriptionLevel4: You prefer listening over speaking.
descriptionLevel5: You once went a whole day without saying more than 10 words.

descriptionLevel1: People are exhausting. You’d rather talk to your plants.
descriptionLevel2: You’re selective about whose life story you want to hear.
descriptionLevel3: Some people yes, most people… maybe later.
descriptionLevel4: You genuinely enjoy learning about others.
descriptionLevel5: You’re the person who remembers everyone’s dog’s birthday.

descriptionLevel1: Your desk looks like a minimalist Instagram photo.
descriptionLevel2: You usually clean up after yourself.
descriptionLevel3: Sometimes tidy, sometimes a mild disaster zone.
descriptionLevel4: Things tend to pile up in creative locations.
descriptionLevel5: You have a “floor wardrobe” and lost your keys… again.

text: Am relaxed most of the time
descriptionLevel1: Your resting heart rate is “mild panic.”
descriptionLevel2: You get tense quite often.
descriptionLevel4: You stay pretty calm day-to-day.
descriptionLevel5: Zen master level. Nothing fazes you.

descriptionLevel1: You live in the world of metaphors and hypotheticals.
descriptionLevel2: Abstract concepts are fun for you.
descriptionLevel4: You prefer concrete, practical ideas.
descriptionLevel5: “What does this even mean?” is your default reaction to philosophy.

descriptionLevel1: Social situations feel like being thrown into a shark tank.
descriptionLevel2: You need time to warm up.
descriptionLevel3: Comfortable with friends, awkward with strangers.
descriptionLevel4: You generally feel at ease in social settings.
descriptionLevel5: You could make friends with a lamppost.

descriptionLevel1: You’d rather compliment someone’s shoes than criticize them.
descriptionLevel2: You avoid hurting others’ feelings.
descriptionLevel3: Only when they really deserve it.
descriptionLevel4: You can be blunt or sarcastic.
descriptionLevel5: Your roasts could be a Netflix special.

descriptionLevel1: You once put salt in your coffee twice.
descriptionLevel2: Big picture person. Details are annoying.
descriptionLevel3: You catch some details, miss others.
descriptionLevel4: You notice the little things.
descriptionLevel5: You spot typos from three rooms away.

descriptionLevel1: You live in the moment. Tomorrow can worry about itself.
descriptionLevel2: You worry only about important stuff.
descriptionLevel4: You tend to overthink possible bad outcomes.
descriptionLevel5: You’ve already mentally rehearsed 47 disasters for next Tuesday.

descriptionLevel1: Your daydreams are just about food and sleep.
descriptionLevel2: Imagination is okay, but you stay realistic.
descriptionLevel4: You often picture wild scenarios.
descriptionLevel5: Your brain is a 4K IMAX theater running 24/7.

descriptionLevel1: You were born to be in the spotlight.
descriptionLevel2: You enjoy being noticed.
descriptionLevel4: You prefer staying low-key.
descriptionLevel5: You’re basically a ninja in social settings.

descriptionLevel1: “Just stop crying and fix it” is your go-to advice.
descriptionLevel2: You’re not the most empathetic person.
descriptionLevel4: You easily feel what others feel.
descriptionLevel5: You absorb emotions like an emotional sponge.

descriptionLevel1: You color-code your chaos and still make it look organized.
descriptionLevel2: You rarely mess things up.
descriptionLevel4: Things tend to get disorganized around you.
descriptionLevel5: You could turn a simple task into performance art of disaster.

descriptionLevel1: You have seasonal depression… in all seasons.
descriptionLevel2: You feel down fairly often.
descriptionLevel4: You’re generally in a good mood.
descriptionLevel5: You’re basically a walking ray of sunshine.

text: Am not interested in abstract ideas
descriptionLevel1: You debate philosophy in the shower.
descriptionLevel2: You enjoy deep, theoretical topics.
descriptionLevel4: You prefer practical over abstract.
descriptionLevel5: “If it’s not useful right now, I don’t care.”

descriptionLevel1: You wait for others to speak first… always.
descriptionLevel2: You join conversations but rarely start them.
descriptionLevel4: You easily initiate talks.
descriptionLevel5: You could start a conversation with a rock.

text: Am not interested in other people's problems
descriptionLevel1: You’re everyone’s unpaid therapist.
descriptionLevel2: You care about others’ issues.
descriptionLevel3: Depends on how close you are.
descriptionLevel4: You prefer to stay out of drama.
descriptionLevel5: “That sounds like a you problem.”

descriptionLevel1: Procrastination is your love language.
descriptionLevel2: You do them… eventually.
descriptionLevel4: You usually finish chores quickly.
descriptionLevel5: You finish chores before they even become chores.

descriptionLevel1: You remain calm even when everything is on fire.
descriptionLevel2: Small things rarely bother you.
descriptionLevel4: You get disturbed pretty easily.
descriptionLevel5: Everything bothers you. Everything.

descriptionLevel1: Ideas? What ideas?
descriptionLevel2: You get occasional decent ideas.
descriptionLevel3: You have some good ideas now and then.
descriptionLevel4: You often come up with creative ideas.
descriptionLevel5: Your brain is a nonstop idea fireworks show.

descriptionLevel1: You talk so much your friends need a mute button.
descriptionLevel2: You’re quite chatty in most situations.
descriptionLevel3: You talk when you have something to say.
descriptionLevel4: You prefer listening over speaking.
descriptionLevel5: You once went a whole day without saying more than 10 words.

descriptionLevel1: You’re emotionally bulletproof.
descriptionLevel2: You’re not easily moved.
descriptionLevel4: You’re quite compassionate.
descriptionLevel5: Your heart is made of marshmallow.

text: Often forget to put things back in their proper place
descriptionLevel1: Everything always goes back to its exact spot immediately.
descriptionLevel2: You usually remember to tidy up.
descriptionLevel4: Things often stay where you left them.
descriptionLevel5: Your room looks like a post-apocalyptic thrift store.

descriptionLevel1: It takes a lot to upset you.
descriptionLevel2: You stay calm most of the time.
descriptionLevel4: You get upset pretty easily.
descriptionLevel5: Your emotional stability is held together by tape.

text: Do not have a good imagination
descriptionLevel1: Your imagination runs wild 24/7.
descriptionLevel2: You have a pretty active imagination.
descriptionLevel4: You’re not very imaginative.
descriptionLevel5: You think a potato is just a potato.

text: Talk to a lot of different people at parties
descriptionLevel1: You hug the wall like it’s your best friend.
descriptionLevel2: You talk to a few people you already know.
descriptionLevel3: You talk to some new people if the mood is right.
descriptionLevel4: You enjoy chatting with many different people.
descriptionLevel5: You’re the human equivalent of group chat.

text: Am not really interested in others
descriptionLevel1: You’re deeply curious about everyone’s life.
descriptionLevel2: You care about others quite a bit.
descriptionLevel4: You’re not very interested in others.
descriptionLevel5: Other people? What other people?

descriptionLevel1: Chaos is your comfort zone.
descriptionLevel2: Order is nice but not necessary.
descriptionLevel4: You prefer things organized.
descriptionLevel5: Your life runs on color-coded spreadsheets.

descriptionLevel1: Your mood is rock-solid.
descriptionLevel2: Your mood is fairly stable.
descriptionLevel4: Your mood changes quite often.
descriptionLevel5: You have more mood swings than a playground.

descriptionLevel1: You need things explained multiple times.
descriptionLevel2: You understand most things at normal speed.
descriptionLevel4: You understand things fast.
descriptionLevel5: You get it before the sentence is even finished.

text: Don't like to draw attention to myself
descriptionLevel1: You love being the center of attention.
descriptionLevel2: You don’t mind attention.
descriptionLevel4: You prefer not to stand out.
descriptionLevel5: You’d rather blend into the wallpaper.

descriptionLevel1: Your time is strictly yours.
descriptionLevel2: You help when it’s easy.
descriptionLevel4: You often make time for others.
descriptionLevel5: You’d drop everything to help someone.

descriptionLevel1: You never avoid responsibilities.
descriptionLevel2: You rarely avoid duties.
descriptionLevel4: You often put off responsibilities.
descriptionLevel5: Duties? What duties?

descriptionLevel1: Your mood is extremely stable.
descriptionLevel2: Your mood doesn’t swing much.
descriptionLevel4: Your mood swings quite a bit.
descriptionLevel5: You have more mood swings than a playground.

descriptionLevel1: You keep your words simple.
descriptionLevel2: You use normal vocabulary.
descriptionLevel4: You enjoy using sophisticated words.
descriptionLevel5: You use words that make dictionaries nervous.

text: Don't mind being the center of attention
descriptionLevel1: Being the center of attention feels terrifying.
descriptionLevel2: You’d rather not be noticed.
descriptionLevel4: You’re okay with attention.
descriptionLevel5: You love being in the spotlight.

descriptionLevel1: You rarely notice how others feel.
descriptionLevel2: You notice emotions sometimes.
descriptionLevel3: You can usually tell how people feel.
descriptionLevel4: You easily pick up on others’ emotions.
descriptionLevel5: You feel other people’s emotions more than your own.

descriptionLevel1: A schedule? That’s cute.
descriptionLevel2: You follow a loose plan.
descriptionLevel4: You usually stick to your schedule.
descriptionLevel5: Your life is color-coded and timestamped.

descriptionLevel1: It takes a lot to irritate you.
descriptionLevel2: You stay calm most of the time.
descriptionLevel4: You get irritated quite easily.
descriptionLevel5: Everything and everyone irritates you.

descriptionLevel1: You live completely in the moment.
descriptionLevel2: You reflect occasionally.
descriptionLevel4: You enjoy reflecting on life.
descriptionLevel5: Your brain is a 24/7 philosophy podcast.

descriptionLevel1: You become a social butterfly with strangers.
descriptionLevel2: You warm up quickly.
descriptionLevel4: You tend to be quiet around strangers.
descriptionLevel5: You go full silent mode with new people.

descriptionLevel1: People feel awkward around you.
descriptionLevel2: You’re neutral in social comfort.

descriptionLevel4: You’re good at making others feel at ease.
descriptionLevel5: You’re a walking comfort blanket.

descriptionLevel1: You do the bare minimum.
descriptionLevel2: You do decent work.
descriptionLevel4: You pay close attention to quality.
descriptionLevel5: Your work is obsessively precise.

descriptionLevel1: You’re almost always in a good mood.

descriptionLevel4: You often feel down.
descriptionLevel5: Sadness is your default setting.

descriptionLevel1: Your idea tank is usually empty.
